text: I feel swept up in the exuberance and unpredictability of the moment. The energy here is chaotic and playful, almost as if curiosity has gotten the better of us and we are on the edge of crossing boundaries that might lead to unexpected consequences. It is both exhilarating and slightly unsettling—there is a sense of impulsiveness, of wanting to test limits, but also sudden discomfort. I am intrigued, cautious, and alive to the immediacy of the experience.
